case_title: STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY vs. TEIXIERA, JOSEPH ANTHONY et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT TEIXIERA, JOSEPH ANTHONY CITY CAB CO. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-29-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-30-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-09-1996
NOTICE OF LIEN ATTORNEY'S LIEN FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-29-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), IF NO PROOF OF SERVICE AN ORDER TO PUBLISH IS TO BE FILED. IF NO APPEARANCE BY COUNSEL OF RECORD AND/OR NO GOOD CAUSE SANCTIONS WILL BE IMPOSED. HEARING SET FOR DEC-02-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-02-1996, OFF CALENDAR
